mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim is Our Command!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-last week, I stroll into a fancy restaurant, looking more dashing than ever in my custom-tailored suit. The matre d' practically falls over himself when he sees me, stumbling to offer the best table in the house. I graciously accept, of course, and settle in for a meal fit for a king.As I peruse the menu, I notice they have a so-called "specialty cocktail" listed at an exorbitant price. Now, being the discerning man of taste that I am, I decide to order it without hesitation. Imagine my shock when the waiter, a mere mortal, has the audacity to inform me they've run out of a key ingredient for my drink!I feel my blood begin to boil, my entitlement rising like a tsunami. How dare they not anticipate my every desire and whim? I demand to speak to the manager immediately, my voice dripping with disdain. Moments later, the manager scurries over, apologizing profusely for the oversight.I lean back in my chair, a smug smile playing on my lips. I make it abundantly clear that this level of incompetence is simply unacceptable. To make amends, not only do I receive a complimentary round of drinks for my table, but they also throw in a decadent dessert on the house.As I savor each bite of the sweet victory, I can't help but revel in the power of my entitlement. After all, it's not every day one gets to witness firsthand the lengths people will go to satisfy my every whim. Ah, the joys of being me.
